metadata.description: bildr.hub plugin marketplace — curated skills for Claude Code. Design, security, backend patterns, React, brand identity, and knowledge base management.

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.description: Create distinctive, premium-quality frontend interfaces with OKLCH color system, typography guidance, theme archetypes, and AI slop detection.

plugins.name: bildr-hub-identity
plugins.description: bildr.hub brand identity — dual-mode design system, document templates (quotes, contracts), typography, and communication tone guide.

plugins.name: bildr-learn
plugins.description: Manage the bildr.hub public knowledge base — create, update, and organize dev notes with consistent structure and formatting.

plugins.name: bildr-review
plugins.description: BILDR security review — auth framework defaults, middleware auth enforcement, session management, IDOR, XSS, input validation, RLS, token flows.

plugins.name: backend-patterns
plugins.description: Backend best practices for Drizzle ORM, SQLite/D1, query optimization, tRPC, Hono, and Cloudflare Workers.

plugins.name: react-patterns
plugins.description: React frontend best practices — hooks ordering, state sync, optimistic UI, performance, and common pitfalls from production bugs.

plugins.name: ui-ux-pro-max
plugins.description: Manual-only — industry-specific design system generator with 161 color palettes, 57 font pairings, 99 UX guidelines, and searchable CSV databases. Based on nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill.

plugins.name: uat-setup
plugins.description: PostHog analytics and feedback widget integration for any frontend project. Detects framework (Next.js, React, Vue, Svelte, Angular), ORM/DB (Drizzle, Prisma), and color scheme automatically.
